title: cyclosorus parasiticus var. subpubescens
intro: Cyclosorus parasiticus var. subpubescens is a variety of the Cyclosorus parasiticus plant, which is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus parasiticus var. subpubescens include its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
